zh.lifeSummary: 當Alice Pelham於1570年12月2日在英國素可列維斯受洗時，她的父親Sir John Pelham33歲，母親Lady Judith Saint John25歲。她於1580年5月8日與John Tucker在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 克萊門特 易亞斯亞普 煙雨 聖 馬丁 奧爾加結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。她去世於1602年6月12日在英國倫敦享年31歲，埋葬在英國米德萊可倫敦 聖 埃德蒙 馮 金 煙雨 聖 尼古拉斯 阿可斯。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Alice Pelham于1570年12月2日在英国素可列維斯受洗时，她的父亲Sir John Pelham33岁，母亲Lady Judith Saint John25岁。她于1580年5月8日与John Tucker在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 克萊門特 易亞斯亞普 煙雨 聖 馬丁 奧爾加结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。她去世于1602年6月12日在英国倫敦享年31岁，埋葬在英国米德萊可倫敦 聖 埃德蒙 馮 金 煙雨 聖 尼古拉斯 阿可斯。

nameMeanings.name: Pelham
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English (mainly Sussex): habitational name from Brent Pelham, Furneux Pelham, and Stocking Pelham in Hertfordshire, so called from the Old English personal name Pēola + hām ‘homestead’. Compare Pellham .

History: The manor of Pelham in Hertfordshire, England, was held by Walter de Pelham in the reign of Edward I (1272–1307). His descendants became constables of Pevensey Castle, Sussex, and were so influential that their badge, the buckle, is seen in at least eleven of the county's churches, and as a decoration on iron chimney-backs in Sussex farmhouses. Various branches of the family were ennobled and their titles include earl of Chichester and earl of Yarborough. The family also once held the dukedom of Newcastle and the marquessate of Clare. Peter Pelham (born c. 1695), an engraver, emigrated to Boston, MA, after 1728, and was stepfather to the artist John Singleton Copley.

nameMeanings.name: Alice
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Originally a variant of Adelaide , representing an Old French spelling of a reduced form of Germanic Adalheidis. Alice and Adelaide were already regarded as distinct names in English during the medieval period. Alice enjoyed a surge of popularity in the 19th century and periods of favour ever since. It was the name of the central character of Lewis Carroll's Alice's Adventures in Wonderland ( 1865 ) and Through the Looking Glass ( 1872 ), who was based on his child friend Alice Liddell , daughter of the Dean of Christ Church, Oxford.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

historicEvents.title: The First English Colony is Established in America
historicEvents.description: England established its first colony in North America in 1585 as a way to generate additional wealth. The colony was named Virginia, after the virgin Queen Elizabeth I.

historicEvents.title: Elizabeth I Signs Death Warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots
historicEvents.description: Elizabeth I signed the death warrant for Mary, Queen of Scots, on February 1, 1587, as she was found guilty of plotting to assasinate Elizabeth. Mary, Queen of Scots, was beheaded at Fotheringhay Castle in England on February 8, 1587.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Elizabeth I.org - Mary Queen of Scots

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

en.lifeSummary: When Alice Pelham was christened on 2 December 1570, in Lewes, Sussex, England, her father, Sir John Pelham, was 33 and her mother, Lady Judith Saint John, was 25. She married John Tucker on 8 May 1580, in London St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, Middlesex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. She died on 12 June 1602, in London, England, at the age of 31, and was buried in London St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, Middlesex, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Alice Pelham a été baptisée le 2 décembre 1570, à Lewes, Sussex, Angleterre, son père, Sir John Pelham, avait 33 ans et sa mère, Lady Judith Saint John, avait 25 ans. Elle a épousé John Tucker le 8 mai 1580, à London St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, Middlesex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Elle est décédée le 12 juin 1602, à Londres, Angleterre, à l’âge de 31 ans, et a été enterrée à London St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, Middlesex, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Alice Pelham am 2. Dezember 1570 in Lewes, Sussex, England getauft wurde, war ihr Vater Sir John Pelham 33 und ihre Mutter Lady Judith Saint John 25. Sie hat am 8. Mai 1580 in London St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, Middlesex, England John Tucker geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Sie starb am 12. Juni 1602 im Alter von 31 Jahren in London, England und wurde in London St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, Middlesex, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Pelham è stato battezzato il 2 dicembre 1570 nel Lewes, Sussex, England, sua padre, Sir John Pelham, aveva 33 anni e sua madre, Lady Judith Saint John, aveva 25 anni. Lei sposato John Tucker il 8 maggio 1580, nel London St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, Middlesex, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì il 12 giugno 1602, nel London, England, all'età di 31 anni, e fu sepolta a London St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, Middlesex, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Alice Pelhamが1570年12月2日にイギリススセックスルスで洗礼を受けた時，父Sir John Pelhamは33歳，母Lady Judith Saint Johnは25歳であった。1580年5月8日にイギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト クレメント エアストチェアップ ウィス スト マルティン オルガーでJohn Tuckerと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼女は1602年6月12日にイギリスロンドンで31歳で死去し，イギリスミッドレセックスロンドン スト エドムンド ス キング ウィス スト ニチオラス アコンスにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Alice Pelham(이)가 1570년 12월 2일 영국 수세스 루스에서 침례를 받았을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir John Pelham(은)는 33세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Judith Saint John(은)는 25세였다. 그녀는 1580년 5월 8일 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 클레멘트 이스트체아프 위스 스트 마틴 르가에서 John Tucker(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1602년 6월 12일 영국 런던에서 31세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 미들레세스 런던 스트 에드먼드 테 킨그 위스 스트 닉홀아스 악스에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Alice Pelham foi batizada em 2 de dezembro de 1570, em Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, seu pai, Sir John Pelham, tinha 33 anos e sua mãe, Lady Judith Saint John, tinha 25 anos. Ela casou-se com John Tucker em 8 de maio de 1580, em London St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ela faleceu em 12 de junho de 1602, em London, Inglaterra, com 31 anos, e foi sepultada em London St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, Middlesex, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Alice Pelham была крещена 2 декабря 1570 г. в местности львесь, суссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени Sir John Pelham было 33 года, а матери, которую звали Lady Judith Saint John, 25. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени John Tucker 8 мая 1580 г. в местности лондон ст клемент эасчип вит ст мартинь оргар, миддлесекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Она умерла 12 июня 1602 г. в местности Лондон, Англия в возрасте 31 год и была похоронена в местности лондон ст эдмунд т кинг вит ст ничолас акунс, миддлесекс, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Alice Pelham se bautizó el 2 de diciembre de 1570, en Lewes, Sussex, Inglaterra, su papá, Sir John Pelham, tenía 33 años y su mamá, Lady Judith Saint John, tenía 25 años. Se casó con John Tucker el 8 de mayo de 1580, en London St Clement Eastcheap with St Martin Orgar, Middlesex, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija. Murió el 12 de junio de 1602, en London, Inglaterra, a la edad de 31 años, y fue sepultada en London St Edmund the King with St Nicholas Acons, Middlesex, Inglaterra.
